# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/x"}]
        element ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
          "x"
      element ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
        "y"
